description: Letter fragment in Arabic script. Opens with greetings to the mother. Mentions Naṣr al-Dīn. The address on verso is written in a different hand: to be delivered to Abū l-Riḍā. Then in Judaeo-Arabic: "from his mother." So perhaps one side is the response to the other side.
description_he: מכתב בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
